mapper.select: SELECT id, topic_id, passage_text, audio_storage_key, created_at FROM listening_library_sections WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} ORDER BY id
SELECT id, topic_id, passage_text, audio_storage_key, created_at FROM listening_library_sections WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO listening_library_sections (topic_id, passage_text, audio_storage_key) VALUES (#{topicId}, #{passageText}, #{audioStorageKey})
